testcase.name: test_record_invalid_label_400
testcase.failure: test_credentials_auth.py:293: in test_record_invalid_label_400 assert r.status_code == 400 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_record_invalid_category_400
testcase.failure: test_credentials_auth.py:300: in test_record_invalid_category_400 assert r.status_code == 400 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
